titleStmt.title: SII 25.193: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 193. (A.R. No. 193 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantarapurīśvara temple.
This record is dated in the 29th+1st regnal year and other details of date are Kaṟkaṭaka, trayōdaśi, Punarpūśam, Monday ••

This record refers to the gift of land as iṟaiyili for the food offerings to the deity Subrahmaṇya in the temple of Tiru-Uśāttānam-uḍaiyār enshrined to the west of prākāra (tirunaḍaimāḷigai) in the assembly of Peruvāḻvutandaperumal-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, an agara in Puṟaṅkarambaināḍu, a sub-division of Rājēndraśōḷa-vaḷanāḍu. Among the boundaries of the land Ulōgamādēvi-vadi is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
irācarācatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Irupatto
ṉpatāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kaṟkaṭakanāya
ṟṟu Aparapakkattu trayoteciyum tiṅka
ḷkkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ
Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai
nāṭṭu Akaram śrīperuvāḻvu tantaperumāḷ
caturvvedimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahā
sabhaiyār Eḻuttu . Ivvūr kaṇakku mahājaṉapri
yaṉum taṉ(m)mapiriyaṉum kaṇ(ṭ)ṭu kaṉaṟāppuṭai
yār teṉṉāṭṭurayar cākkāṉamā
ṉa keraḷakulācaṉi caturvvedimaṅkalattu Uṭai
yār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyār koyil me
lait tirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil Eḻuntaruḷi vi
ttac cuppiramaṇyappiḷḷaiyārkku tiruva
mutupaṭikku Ivaruṭaiya tirukkaiymalaril
nāṅkaḷ nirvāttu kuṭutta nilamāvatu piṭākai ko
ṟṟa nallūrāṉa tevuntiruvumuṭaiya nallūril
Ulokamātevi vītikku meṟkkum viranārāyaṇa
vāykkālukku teṟkkum AiccāṅRead aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu kiṭ
kkaṭaiya rūpāy nikki Itaṉ tekku rūpāy Iṉ
ṉilam Orumāvum Ināyaṉāṟkku tiruamutupaṭikku can
tirātittavaraiyum tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyum Iṟaiyili
yumākak kuṭuttu (1/2)rūpāy Orumāvukkum
29 tāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Aṉupa
vikka kaṭavatākavum Innilattāl vanta tara
ppaṭi maṭakku kaḻittup piḷḷaiyār tiruṉāmat
tu Iṟaiyiliyāka Oḻukilum pottakattilu
niṟuttavum Innilattāl vantatarappaṭi maṭakkum
Oṭṭuppaṭi nellum niṉaippiṭum vaṟkkaṅkaḷu
m kuṭimai koyiṟṟampa peṟu Uḷḷiṭṭanavum Ū
rkkaṇakkar jīvitamum sabhāviniyokamum veḷ
ḷāṉ viniyokamum Ūrmaravintu Iṟukkumavai
Ūrile Eṟaṭṭu Iṟukkakaṭavatākavum con
nom Ippaṭi ceyka . paṇiyāl Ūrkkaṇak
ku mahājanappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu śrī kuṣṇapaṭṭasya vira
rācentirappiramātirājasya kūṭal civāmaṉapaṭṭasya terā
ḷi paṭṭasya nārāyaṇapaṭṭasya cakka
tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭasya Āṇṭanampipaṭṭasya cināraciṅka
paṭṭasya Āḷkkoḷḷipaṭṭasya Irāyanārāyaṇa paṭṭasya
yajnapaṭṭasya civāsudevapaṭṭasya yajnātmapaṭṭasya vi
śveśvarapaṭṭasya yajnātmapaṭṭasya yajnātmapaṭṭasya
cūriyatevapaṭṭasya Aiyyanampipaṭṭasya sarvvakratupaṭṭa
sya Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭasya vedasāsa paṭṭasya vāmana
paṭṭasya Irācarāca paṭṭasya kecavapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai
nārāyaṇapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai ceṭṭalūr ti
ruveṅkaṭapaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku Ivai śrī kruṣṇapaṭṭasya
The beginning and the end of this and the following lines are lost. caṅkara nārāyaṇa paṭ
—ṭasya Akkipaṭṭasya tip
—ppaṭikku Ippiṭi
—ramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭa
—cuntarat toṭuṭai
Digital edition of SII 25.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
